query:
SELECT i.id, i.code, i.text, c.name as criterion_name, c.id as criterion_id, d.name as domain_name
FROM indicators i
JOIN criteria c ON i.criterionId = c.id
JOIN domains d ON c.domainId = d.id
ORDER BY d.id, c.id, i.code;
